title: Aviation Accessibility Task and Finish Group report
body: "The Aviation Accessibility Task and Finish Group was established in November 2024 to bring together industry, consumer representatives and the Civil Aviation Authority.  The Group was tasked with:   identifying key challenges and barriers faced by disabled passengers when travelling by air developing practical and achievable actions to improve accessibility across the aviation sector   This report presents the Group’s findings and recommendations, structured around 5 key focus areas:   training passenger information and communications non-visible impairments mobility aid design and handling tailored service and delivery   "
